action.reasoning: Observation: Controller works with negative angle feedback. Got 117 safe steps in ep1 (need 500). Robot takes too long to reach human. Analysis: Need faster approach, better following. Decision: Tune controller aggressively - max forward speed when aligned, tight following in zone. Submit eval.
